basics.name: Shivansh Choudhary
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience building enterprise-scale distributed systems in Java, Spring Boot, and React. Consistent track record of 40–70% performance improvements across APIs, databases, and data pipelines. Passionate about clean architecture, measurable impact, and turning complex business problems into elegant technical solutions.

work.name: NAV Fund Administration Group
work.summary: Lead delivery of an Investment Tracker used across thousands of portfolios, integrating a DMS, external partner APIs, and the accounting platform.
highlights: Led Investment Tracker Platform delivery across 5,000+ funds, integrating DMS, external partner APIs, and accounting platform
Built Spring Boot schedulers and React dashboards cutting document processing delays by 40%
Deployed 10M+ row Cassandra reporting database, reducing report latency from minutes to seconds
Introduced Kafka ingestion pipeline with staging and reconciliation, replacing manual imports (~70% effort saved)
Integrated AI tooling (Cursor + CodeAnt AI) to accelerate code reviews and delivery (~25% gain)

work.name: NAV Fund Administration Group
work.summary: Focused on scale and performance for user-facing services, reworking REST endpoints, delivering distributed caching, and shipping a Client Payments Settlement module.
highlights: Reworked REST endpoints with distributed caching and indexing, cutting median API latency by 60% for 2,500+ daily users
Implemented partitioning on a 5TB+ SQL Server database, trimming query time ~40% and simplifying operations at scale
Shipped Client Payments Settlement module with real-time aging and automated invoicing (~50% manual effort reduction)
Built tag-based self-service reporting framework (Spring Boot + SQL) unifying 20+ tables (-35% IT tickets; hours → minutes)
Delivered Redis cluster migration achieving 66% throughput improvement and faster failover
Rolled out Kerberos for encrypted, compliant service-to-DB access across microservices

work.name: NAV Fund Administration Group
work.summary: Delivered an end-to-end tax-filing solution and contributed to a monolith-to-microservices migration, gaining hands-on experience with scalable architectures and TDD.
highlights: Shipped full-stack tax-filing feature (React + Spring Boot + SQL) reducing cycle time by 50%
Assisted monolith-to-microservices migration (Spring Boot + .NET); built React UIs
Contributed to custom grouping engine across Java/.NET processing 50,000+ records/min with 99.99% accuracy
Participated in Agile ceremonies that improved sprint consistency and team throughput

projects.name: Investment Tracker Platform
projects.description: Enterprise Investment Tracker integrating DMS, external partner APIs, and accounting platform for 5,000+ funds with Spring Boot schedulers and React dashboards.
highlights: 40% reduction in document processing delays
10M+ records managed in Cassandra reporting layer
70% manual effort saved via Kafka ingestion pipeline

projects.name: Cassandra Reporting Database
projects.description: Cassandra-based reporting layer designed to offload SQL Server analytics workloads, supporting 10M+ records with optimised compaction strategies for write-heavy analytics.
highlights: Report latency dropped from minutes to seconds
Primary SQL Server load significantly reduced
10M+ row dataset with optimised compaction

projects.name: Portfolio Website v2
projects.description: Personal portfolio rebuilt with Astro, MDX, and Tailwind CSS — a recruiter-first showcase with blog, case studies, and an HTML+PDF resume system.
highlights: Lighthouse ≥ 90 across Home and Resume pages
WCAG 2.1 AA accessible with full dark/light theme support
Single-source resume system: JSON → typed loader → HTML + downloadable PDF

projects.name: Client Payments Settlement Module
projects.description: Full-stack payments settlement system with real-time aging, automated invoicing, and client notifications, reducing manual accounting effort by 50%.
highlights: 50% reduction in manual accounting effort
Real-time aging and automated invoicing/notifications
Integrated with existing microservices payment infrastructure
